# BP-6 negative: WaitGroup Add before goroutine
lang: go
file: BP-6-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

// Run schedules work after incrementing the WaitGroup in the parent goroutine.
func Run(items []int) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for _, item := range items {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func(v int) {
			_ = v
			wg.Done()
		}(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
}
